overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character exploring a historic urban residential area. The clip follows the character through a private garden courtyard with a wooden house and pergola, onto a cobblestone street with horse-drawn carriages, and finally into a public park. The setting features lush vegetation, Victorian architecture, and period-appropriate street traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: private courtyard with pergola and house

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the private courtyard, observing the garden surroundings near the house

entered.detail: two-story wooden house with dark shutters and a covered porch
simple wooden bench positioned in front of the house entrance
wooden pergola structure with climbing vines overhead
large terracotta pots with tropical plants flanking the house entrance
circular patterned brick paving in the courtyard area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a private residential courtyard with a white clapboard house on the right. The character walks past a wooden bench and under a pergola arbor covered in vines. The area is landscaped with potted plants and features patterned brick paving, creating a secluded garden atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: continuing through the garden past an outdoor dining setup with metal furniture

entered.detail: round white metal table with ornate floral arrangements on top
matching white metal chairs arranged around the dining table
vases with fresh flowers placed on the table surface
rectangular raised garden beds with flowering plants and shrubs

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the garden, the character passes a white wrought-iron dining table set with flower arrangements. The pergola continues overhead while raised stone planters line the path. The house recedes into the background as the garden opens up.

events.description: approaching the decorative iron gate marking the exit from private garden to public street

agents.ego_description: walking toward the garden exit, transitioning from private grounds to public thoroughfare

entered.detail: black wrought iron gate with stone pillars marking the property boundary
tall palm trees visible beyond the gate indicating a warmer climate
historic two-story houses with ornate architecture visible across the street
period-appropriate black street lamp on the sidewalk near the gate

segments.scene_description: The garden opens up as the character approaches the property exit. The pergola and dining area fall behind while an ornate iron gate comes into view, beyond which palm trees and neighboring Victorian houses are visible. The lighting becomes brighter as the character moves out from under the tree cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks

events.description: exits private garden through iron gate onto cobblestone street with tram tracks
horse-drawn carriage passes by on the cobblestone street
pedestrian woman in period dress walks past on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: exiting the property and walking along the cobblestone street, navigating around horse-drawn carriages and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street, passing by the character
woman in a long brown dress walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: cobblestone paved road with metal tram tracks running down the center
black enclosed carriages pulled by horses moving along the street
decorative black iron fence running along the sidewalk edge
wooden telegraph or electric poles lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a busy historic city street with cobblestones and tram tracks. Horse-drawn carriages move along the road while pedestrians in period clothing walk the sidewalks. The scene transitions from private garden to public urban space, with wrought iron fencing and utility poles defining the streetscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: public garden with benches and mature trees

events.description: enters public garden area from the city street, transitioning from cobblestones to gravel paths

agents.ego_description: walking into a public park area, passing people sitting on benches under large trees

notable_agents.action: people sitting on park benches, one man reading and another resting

entered.detail: paths covered in fine gravel winding through the garden
wooden slatted benches placed along the garden paths
massive oak trees with spreading branches and Spanish moss
large classical stone urns placed as garden ornaments along the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a tranquil public garden from the busy street. Gravel paths replace cobblestones, and large live oak trees provide shade over wooden park benches where people are sitting. Decorative stone urns mark the entrance to this green space, creating a peaceful contrast to the urban street just exited.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded private garden through a bustling historic city street and into a tranquil public park. It begins in a residential courtyard, moving past a white clapboard house and under a vine-covered pergola arbor amidst patterned brick paving and potted plants. As the character passes a wrought-iron dining table and stone planters, the garden opens up toward an ornate iron gate where the lighting brightens and palm trees come into view. The scene then shifts abruptly from the private sanctuary to a busy cobblestone street filled with tram tracks, horse-drawn carriages, and pedestrians in period clothing. Finally, the camera leaves the urban noise behind, passing decorative stone urns to enter a peaceful public garden defined by gravel paths and large, shading live oak trees.
